title: Versioned Quarto
text:
This is a Quarto website.
To learn more about Quarto websites visit https://quarto.org/docs/websites.

title: Guide
text:
Add _quarto-latest.yml
Add navbar.right in _quarto.yml to get to swith (or put it somewhere else!)
Include in .github/workflows/publish.yml two “Render” steps, with and without the QUARTO_PROFILE environment variable set
Do not use quarto-actions/publish; push worktree at _site to gh-pages instead
Manually add an “index.html” redirect to the root of the gh-pages branch
